name: Judo Capital Holdings Limited
analysis: JDO's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.4900, stop A$1.3613, target A$1.8500 (2.80:1) — then trail it.
